Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryBaseRetryRandomOffsetRangeMs_IXP

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryBaseRetryTimeMs_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the retry time for telemetry data transmission.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures more reliable data collection for game performance insights.

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryMaxBackoffTimeMs_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the maximum time the system waits before retrying telemetry data sending.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures more reliable data reporting, which can lead to improved game performance.

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryMaxConcurrentRetriedRequests_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Limits the number of retry attempts for telemetry requests to a maximum value.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves the reliability of data collection by preventing overload during high traffic.

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryMaxElapsedTimeMs_IXP

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryMaxRetryAttempts_IXP

Added_Other.purpose: Ensures smoother performance by preventing excessive retries that could slow down gameplay.

Added_Other.name: FFlagRbxTelemetryEnableHttpRetries3_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Enables the system to retry HTTP requests up to three times if they fail.
Added_Other.purpose: Increases reliability of data retrieval, ensuring players have a more stable experience.

Added_Other.name: FFlagTelemetryRetryOnConnectFail_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Retries sending telemetry data if the initial connection fails.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves data accuracy by ensuring important information is sent even if there are connection issues.

Added_Other.name: FFlagTelemetryRetryOnDnsResolve_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Enhances the system's ability to retry DNS resolution for telemetry data.
